title: Flowcharts (Whimsical Integration) and Docs as Views
excerpt: I would love the functionality to add Docs as a “View” to a board. That way I can have my entire team collaborate on the doc, take notes, attach SOPs etc and have it alongside the main project board. It makes it much eas…

posts.author: Rohan-TAP (Rohan Bhatia)
posts.cookedHtml:
I would love the functionality to add Docs as a “View” to a board. That way I can have my entire team collaborate on the doc, take notes, attach SOPs etc and have it alongside the main project board. It makes it much easier to switch from the board to the docs and viceversa when you have all of it in one place.

Workaround is obviously to use Google Docs but it would be nice to use the native doc itself.

Another feature that I’m looking for is to create flowcharts, also attached alongside the board. It could be a simple product that includes boxes and arrows. Or an integration with Whimsical would be great.
